self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can carry this bounded Architecture slice forward into direct adoption without reopening the prior Engine, handoff, and post-consumption evidence chain by hand.
self_improvement.mechanism: The bounded closeout now records an adoption-ready Architecture result and paired decision artifact directly on the bounded-result record.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this closeout, the reopened bounded slice still depended on manual interpretation to decide whether it could move forward as retained Directive-owned Architecture output.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The bounded result 'A second bounded proof-boundary pass confirms that the Daily QA source still reads as ordinary workflow structure with incidental QA language, not a clean evaluator-policy upgrade. The case remains experimental and should stop here until stronger proof-boundary pressure appears.' can now move directly into the normal adoption/materialization path as Architecture-owned output.

decision.rationale: The mechanism is not adoption-ready yet; keep it experimental until readiness and evidence gaps are closed.
decision.stay_experimental_reason: Adaptation decision must exist and reach proceed_to_proof before adoption.; Original-vs-adapted and original-vs-improved delta evidence must be substantive.; All baggage must be explicitly excluded or justified before adoption.; The target artifact type is still unclear after the selection matrix.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
